id.title: Id
id.description: Durable row id; also the keyset pagination cursor

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Document title or URL the content came from

items.title: Evidence
items.description: One piece of retrieved evidence, cited as ``[n]`` in the final answer.

title: ResearchRunOut
description:
One persisted research-run telemetry row, as returned by the console API.

Mirrors ``telemetry.research_runs``: the recorded question/mode/model, the
answer with its full provenance (``trace`` + ``evidence``), per-run timing and
the durable id/timestamp. Named so ``/openapi.json`` exposes a real schema
instead of a free-form object.
